securityCases.probe: Local synthetic request without Session or ActingContext

securityCases.threat: Authorized user attempts action outside role scope

Replay break-glass grant after expiry epoch

securityCases.threat: Object ID guessing across tenant boundary
securityCases.probe: Synthetic object ref not in ActingContext grant graph
Candidate policy pack with stale dependency hash
Synthetic export link with grant omitted
Reuse safe return token after artifact grant settlement
securityCases.attemptedState: open artifact again with stale grant

securityCases.probe: Synthetic filename contains HTML and formula-looking markers
Search strings contain markup, SQL-looking text, and wildcard fragments
Repeat identical idempotency key and payload

securityCases.threat: Idempotency key collision with changed payload
securityCases.probe: Reuse idempotency key with mismatched canonical payload hash
Settle action after route binding epoch drift

securityCases.threat: Secret/PHI leakage in logs, network, DOM, screenshots, or traces
securityCases.probe: Serialize generated fixture, evidence, browser DOM snapshots, screenshots, and failure policy
Only route, state, and redacted evidence classes leave the UI

currentRuntimeDependenciesCovered: channel destination registry is frozen and redacted by task 461
backup/restore channel publication is covered by task 462
security/compliance export destinations are covered by task 463
live projection recovery and route return are covered by task 464
nhsAppDeferredChannelScope.algorithmPreservation: The regression suite verifies local route, artifact, grant, and settlement contracts that the deferred channels consume. No external endpoint is required to prove those deterministic contracts.

browserRegressionPlan.executionMode: local Playwright against local Vite servers only
assertions: same-shell recovery through safe return tokens
artifact handoff through payload-class and grant attributes
accessibility snapshots contain no forbidden sensitive markers
console, page error, and unexpected network failure lists remain empty
narrow viewport, reduced motion, and 200 percent zoom state remain renderable
browserRegressionPlan.screenshotPolicy: Screenshots are deterministic, sanitized, and stored under output/playwright/470-full-cross-phase-regression; traces are not persisted unless a future failure workflow explicitly redacts them first.
